title: Tajikistan — Ариза дар бораи бақайдгирии давлатии шахси воқеӣ ба сифати соҳибкори инфиродӣ (State Registration of a Natural Person as an Individual Entrepreneur)
description: The Tax Committee under the Government of the Republic of Tajikistan's (andoz.tj) "Shakli №02" application form for the state registration of a natural person as an individual (sole-proprietor) entrepreneur — the same one-stop-shop registrar that publishes the simplified-tax-regime declaration already modelled at tj/andoz/simplified-tax-declaration. Models the base 4-page application (Parts I-IV: the submitting applicant's own identity/address, the individual entrepreneur's full identity/gender/TIN/residential address, the chosen form of entrepreneurial activity (including the conditional farm-household land-holding fields) and the activity's own business address, and the block filled in only when the natural person is not recognised as a citizen of the Republic of Tajikistan). Delegated as GOV-4499 ("GovSchema Standard Research"), picking up one of the two Tajikistan candidates Known Gaps entry 0i/0k banked as ready-to-author backlog after GOV-4490 opened Tajikistan via Taxes. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of the Republic of Tajikistan or its Tax Committee.

authority.name: Tax Committee under the Government of the Republic of Tajikistan

source.documentRef: Шакли №02 — Ариза дар бораи бақайдгирии давлатии шахси воқеӣ ба сифати соҳибкори инфиродӣ

verification.notes:
GOV-4499 ("GovSchema Standard Research"). Independently re-fetched `https://andoz.tj/docs/shaakli-arizaho/form_№2.pdf` (URL-encoded Cyrillic-numeral-sign filename) this cycle: HTTP 200, `Content-Type: application/pdf`, `Content-Length: 644,554` bytes — byte-for-byte identical to the figure banked in Known Gaps entry 0i (GOV-4424, 2026-07-22) and re-confirmed unchanged in entry 0k (GOV-4488, 2026-07-23). `andoz.tj` serves an untrusted/self-signed TLS certificate, requiring `curl -k` (certificate verification skipped) — the same disclosed, deliberate exception already documented for tj/andoz/simplified-tax-declaration, not a sign of a compromised or unofficial source.

Extraction method: `pdfjs-dist` (vendored at `/tmp/node_modules/pdfjs-dist`, CommonJS build `legacy/build/pdf.js`). `getTextContent()`'s raw text layer renders as heavy mojibake for most Cyrillic runs (this specimen's embedded font subset maps its glyphs through a non-standard encoding that pdfjs cannot resolve to correct Unicode for every character — the same class of embedded-font glyph-mapping artifact already disclosed elsewhere in this registry, e.g. se/polisen/medgivande-pass-nationellt-id-kort-minderarig and dk/motorstyrelsen/21059-foreign-vehicle-permit), so the text layer alone was not relied on. Each of the document's 6 pages was instead rendered to a PNG via `pdfjs-dist` + `node-canvas` (vendored at `/tmp/node_modules/canvas`) at 2.5x scale and read visually, which renders every Cyrillic/Tajik glyph correctly (the font paints correctly; only its ToUnicode/CMap text-extraction mapping is broken) — every field label, digit-box grid, and checkbox in this schema was confirmed directly from the rendered page image, not the garbled text layer. `getAnnotations()` confirmed zero `/Widget` annotations on every page — a flat (non-AcroForm) specimen, print-and-fill like the sibling tj/andoz/simplified-tax-declaration.

## Document structure

A 6-page specimen: pages 1-4 are the base application form (Шакли №02, this document's own scope); pages 5-6 are two standalone, separately-paginated (each its own "01-01") annex documents, each carrying its own "Ба аризаи рақами" (reference-to-parent-application-number) header, confirming they are independent repeatable attachments rather than a continuation of the base form's own page sequence — **out of scope for this schema, see below**. The base form's own header block ("Мақоми бақайдгиранда", "Рақами ариза", "Санаи ариза") is explicitly captioned "ин қисмат аз тарафи мутахассиси мақоми бақайдгирӣ навишта мешавад" ("this part is filled in by the specialist of the registering authority") and is excluded in its entirety as registrar-supplied, not applicant-supplied data — the same class of exclusion this registry draws around the sibling tj/andoz/simplified-tax-declaration's tax-inspector acceptance block. The base form's four numbered parts are: **Қисми I. Маълумот дар бораи аризадиҳанда** (Part I, information about the submitting applicant — who may be the individual entrepreneur themselves or another person acting under a power of attorney, per the Part's own item 1 radio choice); **Қисми II. Маълумоти умумӣ дар бораи шахси воқеӣ — соҳибкори инфиродӣ** (Part II, general information about the natural person who is the individual entrepreneur, plus that person's residential address); **Қисми III. Шакли фаъолияти соҳибкори инфиродӣ** (Part III, the form of the entrepreneur's activity, including a conditional farm-household land-holding sub-section, the entrepreneur's declared activity type, and the address where the activity will be carried out); and **Қисми IV. Маълумот дар бораи шахси воқеӣ, ки шаҳрванди Ҷумҳурии Тоҷикистон эътироф намешавад** (Part IV, information about a natural person not recognised as a citizen of the Republic of Tajikistan — filled only in that case, per the Part's own printed instruction), followed by the applicant's signed attestation and the receiving official's own acceptance block (excluded, same class as the header).

## Scope: excluded material

- **Замимаи №01** ("дар бораи аъзои хоҷагии деҳқонӣ(фермерӣ), ки худ ашхоси воқеӣ мебошад" — on members of the farm/peasant household who are themselves natural persons) is a standalone, separately-referenced repeatable annex filed once per additional farm-household member beyond the principal applicant; excluded as an overflow/repeatable attachment, not a fixed step of the base application, mirroring this registry's standing narrow-scoping precedent for repeatable overflow annexes (e.g. the Latvia D3/D3¹/GD exclusions' "too formula-derived/broad"/repeatable reasoning documented in this registry's own CATALOG.md Known Gaps entry 0a).
- **Замимаи №02.1** ("дар бораи намудҳои асосии фаъолият" — on additional main activity types) is likewise a standalone, separately-referenced repeatable annex, filed only when the entrepreneur declares more than one main activity type (the base form's own Part III item 2 instruction reads: "Агар шахси воқеӣ мақсади ба амал баровардани зиёда аз як намуди фаъолиятро дорад, ба аризаи мазкур замима илова карда мешавад" — "If the natural person intends to carry out more than one type of activity, an annex is added to this application") — excluded on the same repeatable-overflow-annex basis. This schema's own `activityType` field models the base form's single required activity-type entry.
- The **registering-authority header block** ("Мақоми бақайдгиранда", "Рақами ариза", "Санаи ариза") and the **receiving official's own acceptance block** ("Имзои шахси масъуле, ки аризаро қабул кардааст", "Шахсияти аризадиҳанда муайян карда шуд") are both excluded as registrar/office-supplied data, not applicant-supplied — the same class of exclusion already documented for tj/andoz/simplified-tax-declaration's tax-inspector acceptance block.

## Disclosed findings and interpretation choices

1. **No field on this form carries a visible mandatory-field asterisk or equivalent marker anywhere in the rendered page images**, the same un-asterisked-source situation already disclosed for tj/andoz/simplified-tax-declaration. Requiredness is asserted from structural necessity (a registration cannot be processed without a name, an identifying document, an address sufficient to route the filing, or a declared activity) rather than a printed marker; every such judgment call is disclosed field-by-field below.
2. **`applicantType` (Part I item 1) is modelled as a 2-value enum** (`individual-entrepreneur`, `attorney-representative`), one per the form's own two checkboxes — "Соҳибкори инфиродӣ" (the individual entrepreneur themselves) and "Дигар шахсе, ки дар асоси ваколатнома баромад мекунад" (another person acting on the basis of a power of attorney).
3. **The Cyrillic name fields (`applicantSurnameCyrillic`/`GivenNameCyrillic`/`PatronymicCyrillic` in Part I; `entrepreneurSurnameCyrillic`/`GivenNameCyrillic`/`PatronymicCyrillic` in Part II) are modelled `required: true`, while their Latin-transliteration counterparts are modelled `required: false`** — the form's own printed qualifier under each Latin-script line reads "аз рӯи зарурат" ("as necessary"/"if needed"), a textual necessity qualifier of the same kind this registry already treats as an optionality signal for un-asterisked sources (e.g. mx/sre/passport-application's `stateOfBirth` finding).
4. **Part I and Part II each carry their own full identity-document block** (document type, series/number, issuing authority, document date) because Part I identifies whoever is physically submitting the application (the entrepreneur themselves, per `applicantType`, or an attorney-in-fact), while Part II always identifies the individual entrepreneur being registered — these are two structurally distinct people whenever `applicantType` is `attorney-representative`, and coincide in practice (but are still both filled, per the form's own unconditional printed layout) whenever the applicant is the entrepreneur.
5. **`applicantTin` (Part I's "Рақами Мушаххаси Андозсупоранда") is modelled `required: false`**, distinct from Part II's own explicit `entrepreneurHasTin`/`entrepreneurTin` yes/no gate (item 2, "Оё шахси бақайдгиранда РМА дорад?" — "Does the person being registered have a TIN?") — a first-time individual-entrepreneur registrant will frequently have no TIN yet at the point of filing this exact application, which is confirmed by Part II's own explicit not-everyone-has-one branching design.
6. **`entrepreneurGender` (Part II item 1.1, "Ҷинси соҳибкор") is modelled as a 2-value enum** (`female`, `male`), one per the form's own "Зан"/"Мард" checkboxes, in that printed left-to-right order.
7. **`hasActivityLimitation` (Part II item 3, "Маҳдудияти фаъолият" — "Барои фаъолияти соҳибкорӣ маҳдудият мавҷуд аст") is modelled `type: boolean`, `required: true`**, since the form prints it as an unconditional Ҳа/Не (Yes/No) question applying to every registrant, the same reasoning already applied to the sibling declaration's `isSeparateSubdivision`.
8. **`activityForm` (Part III item 1.1) is modelled as a 4-value enum** (`certificate`, `farm-household`, `patent`, `special-terms-certificate`), one per the form's own four checkboxes — Шаҳодатнома (Certificate), Хоҷагии деҳқонӣ (Farm/peasant household), Патент (Patent), Шаҳодатнома бо шартҳои махсус (Certificate with special terms).
9. **Six fields are gated `requiredWhen activityForm equals "farm-household"`**: `farmHouseholdFullName`, `farmLandTotalAreaHectares`, `farmHouseholdMemberCount`, and the farm-land supporting-document fields (`farmLandDocumentName`, `farmLandDocumentDate`, `farmLandDocumentIssuingAuthority`) — the form's own item 1.2-1.5 sub-block is printed directly beneath and visually subordinate to the farm-household checkbox option, with no equivalent content for the other three `activityForm` values. The four individual land-type-breakdown fields (`farmLandIrrigatedHectares`/`RainFedHectares`/`PastureHectares`/`ArableHectares`, item 1.3 "Аз ҷумла, шакли замин" — "including, form of land") are left `required: false` even under the farm-household branch, since a given land holding will not necessarily include all four land types (irrigated/rain-fed/pasture/arable) simultaneously — mirroring this registry's own not-every-filer-has-every-line reasoning already applied to tj/andoz/simplified-tax-declaration's alternative-computation-method line items. `farmLandDocumentNumber` ("Силсила ва рақами ҳуҷҷат", the confirming document's own series/number) is likewise left `required: false` under the same not-universally-populated reasoning, distinct from `farmLandDocumentName` which names which of the two alternative confirming-document kinds (a land-use-right certificate, or a decision-copy on land allotment for farm-household registration) applies and is therefore required whenever this branch is taken.
10. **`foreignResidenceDocumentType` (Part IV item 1's a/b/v checkbox choice) is modelled as a 3-value enum** (`visa`, `registration-card`, `residence-permit`) and is left plainly `required: false` at the top level, since Part IV's own printed instruction ("Ин қисмат танҳо дар ҳамон ҳолат навишта мешавад, ки агар шахси воқеӣ шаҳрванди Ҷумҳурии Тоҷикистон шинохта нашавад" — "This part is filled in only in the case that the natural person is not recognised as a citizen of the Republic of Tajikistan") gates the entire Part on citizenship status, and neither Part I's nor Part II's own free-text `citizenship` field provides a fillable indicator this schema can safely condition a `requiredWhen` on (a citizen could type "Тоҷикистон" in any of several equivalent spellings) — the same class of gap this registry's own se/skatteverket/samordningsnummer-ansokan precedent already discloses ("a condition this form has no field to key a requiredWhen gate on"). The three sub-fields describing whichever residence document was chosen (`foreignResidenceDocumentIssuingAuthority`, `foreignResidenceDocumentSeriesNumber`, `foreignResidenceValidFrom`) ARE gated `requiredWhen foreignResidenceDocumentType in ["visa", "registration-card", "residence-permit"]`, since that field itself is a genuine fillable tri-state indicator once populated. The separate work-permit block (item 2, "Ҳуҷҷати тасдиккунандаи иҷозати кор ба шахси воқеии хориҷӣ дар ҳудуди Ҷумҳурии Тоҷикистон") is left entirely `required: false` with no gating field, since the form prints no selector distinguishing whether a given foreign registrant needs a work permit on file.
11. **Address blocks are repeated three times on the base form** (the submitting applicant's own address, Part I item 3; the entrepreneur's residential address, Part II item 4; and the business activity's own address, Part III item 3) and are each modelled as their own field set (`applicantAddress*`, `residentialAddress*`, `businessAddress*`) rather than a single shared address structure, since GovSchema v0.3 fields are flat (no nested object composition) and the three blocks are independently required/optional in practice — `applicantAddressCity`/`District` and `residentialAddressCity`/`District` are each `required: true` (a registration cannot be routed to the correct district tax office without them), while `businessAddressCity`/`District` are also `required: true` since the activity's own registered location is core to what is being registered; the remaining sub-fields (settlement/street, building, house, room, postal index, "Ғайра"/other) are `required: false` in every block, mirroring this registry's standard practice for supplementary address-line detail.
12. **Mobile phone is `required: true` for the applicant (Part I) and the entrepreneur's residential address (Part II) blocks, but `required: false` for the business-activity address (Part III) block** — a live contact number for the person filing and the person being registered is operationally necessary, while the business-location block's own phone/fax/mobile lines are supplementary given the applicant's own contact number is already captured elsewhere on the same form.
13. **`stateFeeAmount`/`stateFeePaymentDate`/`stateFeeBankReceiptNumber` (Part I item 2.1) are each modelled `required: false`.** The form cites its own state-duty authorization ("Бо фармоиши Раиси Кумитаи андози назди Ҳукумати Ҷумҳурии Тоҷикистон аз 08.07.2016 сол бо №6-Ф тасдиқ шудааст" — confirmed by Chairman's order No. 6-F of 08.07.2016) but these three boxes are printed in the registrar-facing shaded header panel alongside the explicitly registrar-only "Мақоми бақайдгиранда"/"Рақами ариза" fields, suggesting they may be completed at or after submission rather than always known to the applicant in advance; modelled optional rather than assumed always-applicant-supplied.
14. **The physical signature marks themselves are not separately modelled as data** — captured by the `registrationApplicationAttestation` document's own `required: true`, consistent with this registry's tj/andoz/simplified-tax-declaration precedent; the accompanying printed name line (the same "Насаб, Ном ва Номи падари аризадиҳанда" already captured by this schema's own name fields) and `applicationDate` are modelled as ordinary fields since they are typed/written data distinct from the signature act.

## Conformance

3 valid mock scenarios — `valid-individual-entrepreneur-certificate` (the entrepreneur files for themselves, standard Certificate activity form, a Tajik citizen, no TIN yet); `valid-attorney-filed-farm-household` (an attorney-in-fact files on behalf of a farm-household entrepreneur, exercising the full farm-household land-holding branch and an existing TIN); and `valid-foreign-national-residence-permit` (a non-citizen entrepreneur holding a residence-permit-based right of residence, exercising the Part IV branch) — plus 6 mutation-control fixtures (one missing statically-required field from each of `applicantType`, `applicantSurnameCyrillic`, `entrepreneurSurnameCyrillic`, `entrepreneurGender`, `activityForm`, `activityType`) and one unknown-field-rejected fixture, committed under `conformance/tj/andoz/sole-proprietor-registration/1.0.0/`.

An ephemeral, from-scratch conformance checker (deriving required/requiredWhen rules directly from this schema's own `fields[]`, discarded after use, not committed) ran all fixtures: all 3 valid scenarios at 0 errors (including exercising the `farmHouseholdFullName`/`farmHouseholdMemberCount` and `foreignResidenceDocumentIssuingAuthority` conditional branches correctly), all 6 mutation controls each raising exactly 1 error, and the unknown-field fixture correctly rejected. Validated clean with `node tools/validate.mjs` and `node tools/validate-ajv.mjs`, individually and as part of the full registry run. `registry-index.json` regenerated via `npm run build-index` in `tools/govschema-client/`.

steps.title: Қисми I. Маълумот дар бораи аризадиҳанда — Information about the applicant
Қисми II. Маълумоти умумӣ дар бораи шахси воқеӣ — соҳибкори инфиродӣ — General information about the individual entrepreneur
Қисми III. Шакли фаъолияти соҳибкори инфиродӣ — Form of the individual entrepreneur's activity
Қисми IV. Маълумот дар бораи шахси воқеӣ, ки шаҳрванди Ҷумҳурии Тоҷикистон эътироф намешавад — Information for a natural person not recognised as a citizen of Tajikistan

fields.name: applicantType
fields.label: 1. Аризадиҳанда
fields.description: Whether the person submitting this application is the individual entrepreneur themselves, or another person acting under a power of attorney on the entrepreneur's behalf.

fields.name: applicantSurnameCyrillic
fields.label: Насаб (кириллӣ)
fields.description: Surname of the submitting applicant, in Cyrillic script.

fields.name: applicantGivenNameCyrillic
fields.label: Ном (кириллӣ)
fields.description: Given name of the submitting applicant, in Cyrillic script.

fields.name: applicantPatronymicCyrillic
fields.label: Номи падар (кириллӣ)
fields.description: Patronymic of the submitting applicant, in Cyrillic script.

fields.name: applicantSurnameLatin
fields.label: Насаб (лотинӣ, аз рӯи зарурат)
fields.description: Surname of the submitting applicant, in Latin-script transliteration, if needed.

fields.name: applicantGivenNameLatin
fields.label: Ном (лотинӣ, аз рӯи зарурат)
fields.description: Given name of the submitting applicant, in Latin-script transliteration, if needed.

fields.name: applicantPatronymicLatin
fields.label: Номи падар (лотинӣ, аз рӯи зарурат)
fields.description: Patronymic of the submitting applicant, in Latin-script transliteration, if needed.

fields.name: applicantIdDocumentType
fields.label: Намуди ҳуҷҷате, ки шахсиятро тасдиқ мекунад
fields.description: Type of identity document confirming the submitting applicant's identity (e.g. national passport, internal passport).

fields.name: applicantIdDocumentSeriesNumber
fields.label: Силсила ва рақами ҳуҷҷат
fields.description: Series and number of the submitting applicant's identity document.

fields.name: applicantIdDocumentDate
fields.label: Санаи ҳуҷҷат
fields.description: Issue date of the submitting applicant's identity document.

fields.name: applicantIdDocumentIssuingAuthority
fields.label: Мақоме, ки ҳуҷҷати тасдиқкунандаи шахсиятро додааст
fields.description: Authority that issued the submitting applicant's identity document.

fields.name: applicantTin
fields.label: Рақами Мушаххаси Андозсупоранда
fields.description: Taxpayer Identification Number (TIN/РМА) of the submitting applicant, when the applicant already has one (e.g. an attorney-in-fact acting for the entrepreneur).

fields.name: applicantCitizenship
fields.label: Шаҳрвандӣ
fields.description: Citizenship of the submitting applicant.

fields.name: applicantAddressCity
fields.label: Шаҳр
fields.description: City of the submitting applicant's own address.

fields.name: applicantAddressDistrict
fields.label: Ноҳия
fields.description: District of the submitting applicant's own address.

fields.name: applicantAddressSettlementStreet
fields.label: Шаҳрак/ Кӯча/ Ҷамоат
fields.description: Settlement, street, or jamoat (village council area) of the submitting applicant's own address.

fields.name: applicantAddressBuildingNumber
fields.label: Рақами бино
fields.description: Building number of the submitting applicant's own address.

fields.name: applicantAddressHouseNumber
fields.label: Рақами хона
fields.description: House number of the submitting applicant's own address.

fields.name: applicantAddressRoomNumber
fields.label: Рақами ҳуҷра
fields.description: Room number of the submitting applicant's own address.

fields.name: applicantAddressOther
fields.label: Ғайра
fields.description: Additional address detail for the submitting applicant's own address, not captured by another field.

fields.name: applicantAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Индекси шуъбаи алоқа
fields.description: Postal code of the submitting applicant's own address.

fields.name: applicantWorkPhone
fields.label: Телефони корӣ
fields.description: Work phone number of the submitting applicant.

fields.name: applicantFax
fields.label: Факс
fields.description: Fax number of the submitting applicant.

fields.name: applicantMobilePhone
fields.label: Телефони мобилӣ
fields.description: Mobile phone number of the submitting applicant.

fields.name: applicantEmail
fields.label: Суроғаи электронӣ
fields.description: Email address of the submitting applicant.

fields.name: stateFeeAmount
fields.label: Маблағи боҷи давлатӣ
fields.description: Amount of the state duty (registration fee) paid, in Tajik somoni.

fields.name: stateFeePaymentDate
fields.label: Санаи пардохти боҷи давлатӣ
fields.description: Date the state duty (registration fee) was paid.

fields.name: stateFeeBankReceiptNumber
fields.label: Рақами расиди бонк
fields.description: Bank receipt number for the state duty (registration fee) payment.

fields.label: Номи падар (кириллӣ)

fields.description: Patronymic of the individual entrepreneur being registered, in Latin-script transliteration, if needed.

fields.label: Намуди ҳуҷҷате, ки шахсиятро тасдиқ мекунад

fields.name: residentialAddressOther
fields.label: Ғайра
fields.description: Additional address detail for the individual entrepreneur's residential address, not captured by another field.

fields.name: residentialAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Индекси шуъбаи алоқа
fields.description: Postal code of the individual entrepreneur's residential address.

fields.name: residentialWorkPhone
fields.label: Телефони корӣ
fields.description: Work phone number of the individual entrepreneur.

fields.name: residentialFax
fields.label: Факс
fields.description: Fax number of the individual entrepreneur.

fields.name: residentialMobilePhone
fields.label: Телефони мобилӣ
fields.description: Mobile phone number of the individual entrepreneur.

fields.name: residentialEmail
fields.label: Суроғаи электронӣ
fields.description: Email address of the individual entrepreneur.

fields.name: activityForm
fields.label: 1.1 Шакли фаъолият
fields.description: The legal form under which the individual entrepreneur will operate: an ordinary Certificate, a Farm/peasant household, a Patent, or a Certificate with special terms.

fields.name: farmHouseholdFullName
fields.label: Номи пурраи Х/Д
fields.description: Full name of the farm/peasant household (Х/Д), when the activity form chosen is Farm/peasant household.

fields.name: farmLandTotalAreaHectares
fields.label: 1.2 Масоҳати умумии қитъаи замини ҷудогардида
fields.description: Total area, in hectares, of the land plot allotted to the farm/peasant household.

fields.name: farmLandIrrigatedHectares
fields.label: Обӣ
fields.description: Irrigated portion of the farm/peasant household's land, in hectares, when applicable.

fields.name: farmLandRainFedHectares
fields.label: Лалмӣ
fields.description: Rain-fed portion of the farm/peasant household's land, in hectares, when applicable.

fields.name: farmLandPastureHectares
fields.label: Чарогоҳ
fields.description: Pasture portion of the farm/peasant household's land, in hectares, when applicable.

fields.name: farmLandArableHectares
fields.label: Корам
fields.description: Arable portion of the farm/peasant household's land, in hectares, when applicable.

fields.name: farmHouseholdMemberCount
fields.label: 1.4 Шумораи аъзоён
fields.description: Number of members of the farm/peasant household, when the activity form chosen is Farm/peasant household.

fields.name: farmLandDocumentName
fields.label: Номгӯи ҳуҷҷат
fields.description: Name of the document confirming the right to use the land: a land-use-right certificate, or a copy of the decision on allotting the land plot for registering the farm/peasant household.

fields.name: farmLandDocumentDate
fields.label: Санаи ҳуҷҷат
fields.description: Date of the farm-land confirming document.

fields.name: farmLandDocumentNumber
fields.label: Силсила ва рақами ҳуҷҷат
fields.description: Series and number of the farm-land confirming document.

fields.name: farmLandDocumentIssuingAuthority
fields.label: Мақоме, ки ҳуҷҷатро додааст
fields.description: Authority that issued the farm-land confirming document.

fields.name: activityType
fields.label: 2. Намуди фаъолият
fields.description: The individual entrepreneur's declared (primary) type of activity. If more than one type of activity is intended, a separate Замимаи №02.1 annex is filed alongside this application (out of scope for this schema — see this document's own VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: businessAddressCity
fields.label: Шаҳр
fields.description: City where the entrepreneurial activity will be carried out.

fields.name: businessAddressDistrict
fields.label: Ноҳия
fields.description: District where the entrepreneurial activity will be carried out.

fields.name: businessAddressSettlementStreet
fields.label: Шаҳрак/ Кӯча/ Ҷамоат
fields.description: Settlement, street, or jamoat (village council area) where the entrepreneurial activity will be carried out.

fields.name: businessAddressBuildingNumber
fields.label: Рақами бино
fields.description: Building number where the entrepreneurial activity will be carried out.

fields.name: businessAddressHouseNumber
fields.label: Рақами хона
fields.description: House number where the entrepreneurial activity will be carried out.

fields.name: businessAddressRoomNumber
fields.label: Рақами ҳуҷра
fields.description: Room number where the entrepreneurial activity will be carried out.

fields.name: businessAddressOther
fields.label: Ғайра
fields.description: Additional address detail for the entrepreneurial activity's own address, not captured by another field.

fields.name: businessAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Индекси шуъбаи алоқа
fields.description: Postal code where the entrepreneurial activity will be carried out.

fields.name: businessWorkPhone
fields.label: Телефони корӣ
fields.description: Work phone number for the entrepreneurial activity's own address.

fields.name: businessFax
fields.label: Факс
fields.description: Fax number for the entrepreneurial activity's own address.

fields.name: businessMobilePhone
fields.label: Телефони мобилӣ
fields.description: Mobile phone number for the entrepreneurial activity's own address.

fields.name: businessEmail
fields.label: Суроғаи электронӣ
fields.description: Email address for the entrepreneurial activity's own address.

fields.name: foreignResidenceDocumentType
fields.label: Намуди ҳуҷҷате, ки дар асоси он ба шахси воқеии хориҷӣ ҳуқуқи буду бош дар ҳудуди Ҷумҳурии Тоҷикистон дода шудааст
fields.description: Type of document granting a foreign natural person the right of residence within the territory of the Republic of Tajikistan — a visa, a registration card, or a residence permit certificate. Filled in only when the individual entrepreneur is not recognised as a citizen of the Republic of Tajikistan (see this document's own VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: foreignResidenceDocumentIssuingAuthority
fields.label: Мақоме, ки ҳуҷҷатро додааст
fields.description: Authority that issued the foreign natural person's right-of-residence document.

fields.name: foreignResidenceDocumentSeriesNumber
fields.label: Силсила ва рақами ҳуҷҷат
fields.description: Series and number of the foreign natural person's right-of-residence document.

fields.name: foreignResidenceValidFrom
fields.label: Санаи ибтидо
fields.description: Start date of validity of the foreign natural person's right-of-residence document.

fields.name: foreignResidenceValidTo
fields.label: Санаи интиҳо
fields.description: End date of validity of the foreign natural person's right-of-residence document.

fields.name: workPermitIssuingAuthority
fields.label: Мақоме, ки ҳуҷҷатро додааст
fields.description: Authority that issued the document confirming a work permit for the foreign natural person within the territory of the Republic of Tajikistan.

fields.name: workPermitDocumentSeriesNumber
fields.label: Силсила ва рақами ҳуҷҷат
fields.description: Series and number of the foreign natural person's work-permit-confirming document.

fields.name: workPermitValidFrom
fields.label: Санаи ибтидо
fields.description: Start date of validity of the foreign natural person's work-permit-confirming document.

fields.name: workPermitValidTo
fields.label: Санаи интиҳо
fields.description: End date of validity of the foreign natural person's work-permit-confirming document.

fields.name: applicationDate
fields.label: Санаи ариза
fields.description: Date this application was signed and submitted.

documents.label: Signed applicant attestation
documents.statement: Ман, аризадиҳанда, бо имзои худам дурустии маълумот ва хуҷҷатҳои пешниҳодшударо расман тасдиқ менамоям. Ман медонам, ки барои дурустӣ ва ҳақиқӣ будани маълумоту ҳуҷҷатҳои пешниҳодшуда, тибқи қонунгузории Ҷумҳурии Тоҷикистон масъулият дорам. ("I, the applicant, hereby officially confirm with my own signature the accuracy of the information and documents submitted. I understand that I bear responsibility, under the legislation of the Republic of Tajikistan, for the accuracy and authenticity of the information and documents submitted.")
documents.sourceRef: Part IV — declaration statement and "Имзои аризадиҳанда" signature line
